title: Holo Damage Indicator
description: Adds client-sided, customizable and animated damage indicators when entities take damage/heal.
body: # Holo Damage Indicator A **client-sided** mod that adds damage visualization with customizable indicators that display health changes from both damage and healing. To open config for the mod, use the command `/damageindicator` or by using Mod Menu for Fabric or the built in (neo)Forge config menu. ### Features - **Multiple animation presets** - **Fully configurable text formatting** - **Color code support for text** - **Filter damage sources** _If you enjoy this mod, you may also be interested in my other mods in the holo series:_ | **Modrinth** |**Curseforge** | | ------------ |------------ | |[Holo Health Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/holo-health-indicator)|[Holo Health Indicator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/holo-health-indicator)| |[Holo Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/holo-items)|[Holo Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/holo-items)| ## Showcase ![showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ray22777/BetterDamageIndicator/refs/heads/master/ezgif-6ffba28fe72ce215.webp) ### Config ![showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ray22777/holographic_health_indicators/refs/heads/master/configshowcase.png) ## Dependencies ### Fabric Dependencies Mod Menu is optional. All else is required. | Modrinth |Curseforge | | ------------ |------------ | | HologramAPI |HologramAPI | | Cloth Config |Cloth Config | | Fabric API |Fabric API | | Mod Menu |Mod Menu | ### (Neo)Forge Dependencies | Modrinth |Curseforge | | ------------ |------------ | | HologramAPI |HologramAPI | | Cloth Config |Cloth Config |
